spec_match.rationale: The page now calls PaymentRequest.getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities() on load, displays sorted returned keys, and keeps omitted keys as unknown rather than false.

interactive.rationale: The capabilities preflight, fallback response selector, and existing setup/challenge/verify tabs all drive live output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept remains a full SPC auth flow while now explicitly showing the feature's preflight capability check.

edge_cases.rationale: The fallback selector covers present true, present false, omitted key, missing method, and thrown-error paths alongside the existing WebAuthn failures.

references.rationale: The page cites https://chromestatus.com/feature/4727235745546240 in its references section.

design_system.rationale: New controls and panels use shared design variables and preserve explicit button text colors when local backgrounds are used.

summary: SPC Auth Flow now names and runs the Chrome 147 static capabilities API before the authentication ceremony and includes the required ChromeStatus reference.
